description: Returns the branch relay model name. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cval = rmodnam(ibus, jbus, ickt, slot)
python_syntax: ierr, cval = rmodnam(ibus, jbus, ickt, slot)

error_codes.description: Branch not in network but in model tables; ‘CVAL’ returned.
Branch not in network or in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No SLOT ‘SLOT’ model for this branch; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
